title: Thornwood — The Long Audience
description: Lady Seraphine summons you to a private audience. The court is half-empty; the rest are listening. She has chosen you for a reason.

objectives.description: Visit the throne room during her morning audience.

breadcrumbs.content: Seraphine and Iyatte of Sandrun have hidden mirror-children. She wants a courier who can cross both worlds.

title: Thornwood — The Lacquered Box
description: Carry a lacquered box to the Verge crossroads at sunset. Don't open it. A woman in red will be waiting.

objectives.description: Arrive at the Verge crossroads before sunset with the box sealed.

breadcrumbs.content: The woman in red is a Sandrun courier. The box contains a sealed copy of Iyatte's son's borrowed identity.

title: Thornwood — Resolution
description: Return to Seraphine. She'll know whether you opened the box. The keep's future hangs on the next half-hour.

objectives.description: Choose: held faith / opened it / told someone else.

options.consequence: Seraphine elevates you. Permanent thornwood faction +0.7.
Seraphine knows. She will not say so. -0.5 reputation.
Iyatte's son is exposed. Cross-world war intensifies.
